response.justification: Strong individual contributor with broad full-stack and distributed-systems exposure, but the resume shows no evidence of executive-level leadership, scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, or production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts. Recent AI-agent work appears limited to MCP tooling rather than architecting stateful agentic platforms. Fintech exposure at RIDE Capital is relevant but at IC level, not CTO scope.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby).
Some fintech exposure at RIDE Capital with TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship discipline.
Early AI-agent and MCP infrastructure contributions at re:cinq.
concerns: No executive leadership or experience scaling teams to 30+ engineers.
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments.
Lacks credit-risk, working-capital, or real-time trade decisioning experience required for the role.

key_factors.factor: Insufficient production multi-agent AI systems experience
